name: Getaround, Inc.
description: Getaround, Inc. operates a digital carsharing marketplace that connects car owners with drivers in various cities worldwide. Through its proprietary Getaround Connect technology, the company enables a contactless, keyless sharing experience, allowing users to locate, book, and unlock cars directly from their mobile devices. Getaround aims to optimize vehicle utilization, reduce traffic congestion, and provide convenient, on-demand transportation solutions in urban environments.
